title: acicarpha obtusisepala
intro: Acicarpha obtusisepala, also known as the 'obtuse sepaled acicarpha', is a plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Acicarpha obtusisepala include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. It is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use.
